我本身真係十年以上既Starbucks Customer
多謝ZZZME既idea
我寫左封template
係比較從個人既perspective出發

睇落更似一封敦促信而唔係投訴信
大家睇睇


==============================================

Subject A: Maxim's HK franchise worries
Subject B: Concerns over Maxim's HK franchise
Subject C: Anger over Maxim's HK franchise

==============================================

Dear Starbucks,


Please consider reevaluating your franchise agreement with Maxim’s Hong Kong.

I became one of the first adopters to the concept of Starbucks Experience when your brand entered the market in Hong Kong over a decade ago. Since then Starbucks beverages have become part of my daily routine.

Maxim’s, a Starbucks franchise in Hong Kong, has recently offered their endorsement to the city's Police Force in the midst of a public outcry over excessive violence on peaceful demonstrators committed by the Force. Maxim's endorsement has angered the majority of the local population, followed by a massive boycott campaign against the Maxim's and its franchises.

The boycott campaign against the Maxim's has put a lot of the coffee lovers in Hong Kong at a crossroads because participation in the boycott would mean parting from Starbucks. As a fan of Starbucks, I have to say the negative connotations on Maxim's and their franchises have already put me at a certain level of unease.

I sincerely wish the Starbucks to exercise wisdom in their franchise agreement with the Maxim's.


Regards,
[YOUR NAME HERE]
